    T

    TahmKench - Class in nongui.listofcards.herocard.Support
    Represents the "Tahm Kench" Hero Card.
    TahmKench() - Constructor for class nongui.listofcards.herocard.Support.TahmKench
     
    Talon - Class in nongui.listofcards.herocard.Assassin
    Represents the "Talon" Hero Card.
    Talon() - Constructor for class nongui.listofcards.herocard.Assassin.Talon
    Constructs Talon with his base stats and lethal description.
    Tank - Enum constant in enum class nongui.baseentity.properties.UnitClass
    A highly durable class designed to absorb damage and protect the team.
    TearOfTheGoddess - Class in nongui.listofcards.itemcard.BuffItem
    Represents the "Tear of the Goddess" Item Card.
    TearOfTheGoddess() - Constructor for class nongui.listofcards.itemcard.BuffItem.TearOfTheGoddess
    Constructs a new Tear of the Goddess with its identity and effect text.
    Teemo - Class in nongui.listofleader
    Represents "Teemo" Leader Card.
    Teemo() - Constructor for class nongui.listofleader.Teemo
    Constructs a new Teemo Leader Card with Marksman class and objective bonus ability.
    Theme - Class in gui.board
    Centralized dark-fantasy theme constants used across all player areas.
    THUMB_H - Static variable in class gui.card.ImageCache
     
    THUMB_W - Static variable in class gui.card.ImageCache
     
    TOP_BG - Static variable in class gui.board.Theme
     
    TopHeroesBox - Class in gui.board.field
    Represents the hero field for the top player.
    TopHeroesBox(Player) - Constructor for class gui.board.field.TopHeroesBox
    Constructs the hero field box for the given top player.
    TopPlayerArea - Class in gui.board
    Represents the top area of the game board for a specific player.
    TopPlayerArea(Player) - Constructor for class gui.board.TopPlayerArea
    Constructs the TopPlayerArea for the given player.
    toString() - Method in class nongui.baseentity.BaseCard
    Returns the string representation of the card, which is its name.
    toString() - Method in class nongui.baseentity.LeaderCard
    Returns the string representation of the Leader Card.
    toString() - Method in class nongui.baseentity.Objective
    Returns the string representation of the objective (its name).
    toString() - Method in class nongui.baseentity.Player
     
    trigger(Player, Player) - Method in class nongui.baseentity.cards.ChallengeCard.ChallengeCard
    Executes the specific trigger logic when the Challenge Card is activated.
    TriggerCard - Class in nongui.baseentity
    An abstract base class for cards that trigger automatically based on specific game events or conditions.
    TriggerCard(String, String, String, String) - Constructor for class nongui.baseentity.TriggerCard
    Constructs a new TriggerCard with the specified details.
    TriggerModifier(int, Player) - Static method in class nongui.gameutils.ModifierUtils
    Triggers the interactive modifier phase.
    tryObjective(Player, int) - Static method in class nongui.gamelogic.GameEngine
    Allows the player to attempt to complete an objective on the board.
    tryToComplete(int, Player) - Method in class nongui.baseentity.Objective
    Executes the battle sequence between the player and the objective.
    tryUseAbility(Player) - Method in class nongui.baseentity.cards.HeroCard.HeroCard
    Attempts to use the hero's unique ability.
    TwinDisciplines - Class in nongui.listofcards.modifiercard
    Represents the "Twin Disciplines" Modifier Card.
    TwinDisciplines() - Constructor for class nongui.listofcards.modifiercard.TwinDisciplines
    Constructs a new Twin Disciplines card with its identity and modifier values.
